name: Shenke Slide Bearing Corporation
summary: Shenke Slide Bearing Corporation manufactures and sells bearings for use in AC and DC motors, generators, turbines, fans, pumps, compressors, and other rotating machines in China. The company offers hydro, thermal, nuclear, wind, and other mechanical products, as well as plain bearing. It serves machinery, chemical, power, steel, water conservancy, metallurgy, mining, cement, and other industries. The company also exports its products to Pakistan, Turkey, India, Japan, Australia, Bangladesh, Britain, and other countries. Shenke Slide Bearing Corporation was founded in 1996 and is based in Zhuji, China.
